introSection: Achterbahn was a steel wild mouse kiddie roller coaster previously located at Schwarzwald Park in Löffingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. It was a Mini Mouse model from Zamperla and had been operating since 2010.
fullText: Achterbahn was a steel wild mouse kiddie roller coaster previously located at Schwarzwald Park in Löffingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. It was a Mini Mouse model from Zamperla and had been operating since 2010.
